use_cases: Primary action triggers in modern web applications with premium visual aesthetics
Call-to-action buttons in SaaS dashboards requiring glass-morphism styling
Interactive form submission elements with hover glow effects
Dark mode optimized UI buttons with layered shadow and border effects
ai_summary: A liquid glass morphism button component with inset shadows, gradient backgrounds, and glass-like visual effects. Features multiple variants including a premium 'cool' style with layered borders, ring insets, and dynamic brightness transitions on hover and active states. Optimized for dark mode interfaces with sophisticated depth effects.
